title: Have an automation create an email with information from Updates section
excerpt:
I want a “notify” in an automation to generate an email to item subscribers that includes information from the update section. 
I can see how to trigger the notification based on someone creating an update but there does…

posts.author: AndrewJones (Andrew Jones)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want a “notify” in an automation to generate an email to item subscribers that includes information from the update section.

I can see how to trigger the notification based on someone creating an update but there doesn’t appear to be any field I can select under the “notify” that refers to the updates section.

I want to do this because the system built-in notifications for subscribers do not include enough item detail even though they contain the actual update.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @AndrewJones ,

If you’re open to apps, Board Email Report can be a workaround for your case. There are 2 types of automated reports on a board and item level. On an item level, you can get the following reports:

  • Updates by a specific employee

  • Updates mentioning a specific employee

  • Updates containing attachments

  • Status updates

  • Last updates

You set up automation rules to get reports every day (week, month) with consolidated updates and detailed xls-report as an attachment to people outside monday (no guest access needed!).

Use the Board Email Reports folder (Item Updates) and set up this rule:

image2046×652 75.4 KB

This is how the result looks:

image424×469 24.9 KB

image1462×439 83.1 KB

You can test the app and check if it works for you. I hope you’ll find it helpful. Also, our team can make custom automation for your case in terms of item updates, just reach out to us.

posts.author: AndrewJones (Andrew Jones)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks I appreciate the response. Its not so much the reporting we are after but just triggering individual updates to interested parties. The notifications embedded in Monday.com just don’t contain all the information that the recipients would like to see.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: What kind of item detail are you looking for? Which product (CRM/Work Management, etc) and level (Pro/Enterprise) do you have?

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
AndrewJones:

I want to do this because the system built-in notifications for subscribers do not include enough item detail even though they contain the actual update.

Hi @andreat If you’re looking to pull the update text from the Updates section, and you’re on a Pro or Enterprise plan (work management), you can use the Workflow feature. Just add the “Get the latest update” block and then include that update text in your email body using the “Send Email” action.

I’ve attached a screenshot with more details. Hope this helps! Let me know if you have any questions. Thank you!

image1533×772 72.6 KB

posts.author: AndrewJones (Andrew Jones)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using Monday Dev enterprise. I just want the notification to include more information to describe the item that the update relates to like a title, description and status. Right now the automated mail uses the item field which in most of our boards would be a reference number.
